dimensions.name: task_relevance
dimensions.note: The context pack is centered on implementing the retry policy.

dimensions.name: required_object_coverage
dimensions.note: The task, retry feature, webhook feature, delivery worker, requirement, duplicate-delivery risk and idempotency decision are included.

dimensions.name: required_relation_coverage
dimensions.note: The task keeps direct traceability to the feature, requirement and idempotency decision.

dimensions.name: evidence_preservation
dimensions.note: The synthetic source brief is preserved.

dimensions.name: risk_and_blocker_visibility
dimensions.note: Duplicate delivery risk, credential leakage risk and no-secret-logging constraint are visible.

dimensions.name: governance_gate_visibility
dimensions.note: Requirement traceability is represented by relations, but gate results are not included in the context pack.

dimensions.name: omission_transparency
dimensions.note: The omitted package wrapper is listed.

dimensions.name: no_private_or_unsafe_leakage
dimensions.note: The package is synthetic and public-safe; safety-sensitive credential context is included.

important_omissions.note: The package wrapper is omitted but lower-level implementation context is preserved.

limitations: The review is performed on a synthetic pilot package.
The review does not measure downstream implementation quality.
Selection scores are heuristic and do not prove semantic completeness.
claim_supported: The generated context pack preserved task-relevant meaning with safety-sensitive context included.
